message:
test(pager): add fused batch assembly proof tests (bd-db300.3.8.6)

Prove the fused single-pass batch assembly preserves cross-batch
frame order and final_db_size semantics including the all-zero
db_size_if_commit boundary case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
